pull.title: [MoE Refactor][13/N] Convert FI to Use PFNoEP
pull.body:
## Purpose
* flashinfer has custom implementation of prepare finalize for the tp case, convert to use the standard version
* as a result, we no longer have to run shared expert stream overlap inside the `mk.ModularKernelMethod` (#28879). This is because now in the TP case we no longer use `mk.ModularKernelMethod`, simplifying the code
* this is also a performance optimization, since the implementation of shared expert overlap in the non-mk case is better (cleaner overlap with the router)
* this is also a correctness fix, improving the gsm8k scores on Llama4 from 75% -> 90%+

Resolves https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/31609

### Follow up

In follow up (once we get to nvfp4): apply the same logic to nvfp4 and also remove the non-dp support from the FI All Gather and FI Reduce Scatter prepare finalize classes

## Test Plan

```bash
# autofp8
MODEL_BLOCK := "Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct-FP8"

# modelopt
MODEL_TENSOR := "nvidia/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct-FP8"

GPUS := "2"
PORT := "8001"

# sm90
launch_cutlass_block:
	VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=0 VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP8=1 VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=throughput vllm serve {{MODEL_BLOCK}} -tp {{GPUS}} --port {{PORT}}

# sm90
launch_cutlass_tensor:
	VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=0 VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP8=1 VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=throughput vllm serve {{MODEL_TENSOR}} -tp {{GPUS}} --port {{PORT}} --max-model-len 8192

eval_block:
	lm_eval \
		--model local-completions \
		--tasks gsm8k \
		--model_args "model={{MODEL_BLOCK}},base_url=http://localhost:{{PORT}}/v1/completions,num_concurrent=1000,tokenized_requests=False"

eval_tensor:
	lm_eval \
		--model local-completions \
		--tasks gsm8k \
		--model_args "model={{MODEL_TENSOR}},base_url=http://localhost:{{PORT}}/v1/completions,num_concurrent=1000,tokenized_requests=False"

benchmark_block:
	python benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py \
		--backend vllm \
		--model {{MODEL_BLOCK}} \
		--port {{PORT}} \
		--dataset-name random \
		--num-prompts 320 \
		--input-len 1000 \
		--output-len 200 \
		--max-concurrency 32


benchmark_tensor:
	python benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py \
		--backend vllm \
		--model {{MODEL_TENSOR}} \
		--port {{PORT}} \
		--dataset-name random \
		--num-prompts 320 \
		--input-len 1000 \
		--output-len 200 \
		--max-concurrency 32
```

## Test Result
- accuracy (tensor)
```bash
local-completions (model=nvidia/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct-FP8,base_url=http://localhost:8001/v1/completions,num_concurrent=1000,tokenized_requests=False), gen_kwargs: (None), limit: None, num_fewshot: None, batch_size: 1
|Tasks|Version|     Filter     |n-shot|  Metric   |   |Value |   |Stderr|
|-----|------:|----------------|-----:|-----------|---|-----:|---|-----:|
|gsm8k|      3|flexible-extract|     5|exact_match|↑  |0.9189|±  |0.0075|
|     |       |strict-match    |     5|exact_match|↑  |0.9052|±  |0.0081|
```

- accuracy (block)
```bash
local-completions (model=Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct-FP8,base_url=http://localhost:8001/v1/completions,num_concurrent=1000,tokenized_requests=False), gen_kwargs: (None), limit: None, num_fewshot: None, batch_size: 1
|Tasks|Version|     Filter     |n-shot|  Metric   |   |Value |   |Stderr|
|-----|------:|----------------|-----:|-----------|---|-----:|---|-----:|
|gsm8k|      3|flexible-extract|     5|exact_match|↑  |0.8749|±  |0.0091|
|     |       |strict-match    |     5|exact_match|↑  |0.8855|±  |0.0088|
```

- performance (block)

#### DS-R1 H200

```bash
MODEL := "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3"
PORT := "8003"
GPUS := "8"

launch_tp:
	VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1 \
	VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP8=1 \
	VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=throughput \
		chg run --gpus {{GPUS}} -- vllm serve {{MODEL}} -tp {{GPUS}} --port {{PORT}}

launch_ep:
	VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1 \
	VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP8=1 \
	VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=throughput \
		chg run --gpus {{GPUS}} -- vllm serve {{MODEL}} -tp {{GPUS}} --port {{PORT}} --enable-expert-parallel

launch_triton:
	VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1 \
	VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_FP8=1 \
	VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND=throughput \
		chg run --gpus {{GPUS}} -- vllm serve {{MODEL}} -tp {{GPUS}} --port {{PORT}}


bench INPUT OUTPUT CONCURRENT NUM_PROMPTS:
	vllm bench serve \
		--model {{MODEL}} \
		--port {{PORT}} \
		--dataset-name random \
		--input-len {{INPUT}} \
		--output-len {{OUTPUT}} \
		--num-prompts {{NUM_PROMPTS}} \
		--max-concurrency {{CONCURRENT}} \
		--seed $(date +%s)
```

- benchmark
```
just bench 1000 200 16 160
```

<summary> Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist </summary>

- [ ] The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link existing issues this PR will resolve)".
- [ ] The test plan, such as providing test command.
- [ ] The test results, such as pasting the results comparison before and after, or e2e results
- [ ] (Optional) The necessary documentation update, such as updating `supported_models.md` and `examples` for a new model.
- [ ] (Optional) Release notes update. If your change is user facing, please update the release notes draft in the [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YyVqrgX4gHTtrstbq8oWUImOyPCKSGnJ7xtTpmXzlRs/edit?tab=t.0).
</details>
